_meta.purpose: Sample auth users + Firestore user docs, one per role (architecture §4.2).
_meta.explanation: Gives every role a known login for local testing. seed.mjs creates the Auth user (emulator), sets custom claims {providerId, role} (the same claims fnClaimsSync sets), and writes the matching providers/{id}/users/{uid} doc. Passwords are emulator-only.
_meta.deployment: seed/seed.mjs, dev/local only. NEVER seed users into production.
